pages.full_text:
the village. It is glorious. We went to the diocesan museum, which has one of the most beautiful cloisters I have ever seen. The collegiate church has wonderful Romanesque late [12] carvings.

[photo of stone relief carving]

St. Juliana taking the demon captive.
photo_captions: St. Juliana taking the demon captive.
pages.notes: Page begins mid-sentence continuing from previous spread. References a diocesan museum and collegiate church with Romanesque late 12th century carvings, consistent with Santillana del Mar context visible on right page. The '[12]' notation appears to be a circled '12' in the original, likely meaning 12th century.

pages.full_text:
A good hotel to stay in would be Paradores, Playa Ramon Pelayo 8, 39330 Santillana del Mar, Cantabria. 942-81-80-00. First or 2nd floor
Fax 942, 81-83-91.

There are 4 apostles + a Panto Creator too.

John bought a penknife + we nearly bought a goatskin. We had a delicious supper with white bean soup with a few blobs of sausage, + a pudding of semolina + honey cake.

There are also the Altimira Caves near by, but we have not gone to them.

__Saturday 29th July__

After early sun, a mist surrounded the campsite. We left early in the damp + drove westward, stopping to shop at San Vincente de Barche, where Peter bought a pen knife + we tasted cheeses + sausage at the market. The town was built on a good defensive position on 2 estuaries. We had lunch inland, + found a good swimming river for the boys to try out 2 rubber boats which we [?just] bought.
pages.notes: The hotel address is for Paradores in Santillana del Mar, Cantabria, Spain. 'Altimira Caves' is likely Altamira Caves (the famous cave paintings near Santillana del Mar) — transcribed as written. 'San Vincente de Barche' could read 'San Vincente de la Barquera' — the diary spells it 'Barche'; this is a coastal town in Cantabria. 'Panto Creator' likely means 'Pantocrator' (Christ in Majesty). Year cannot be determined from this page alone; the volume covers 1989–2003 and this is page 68 of handwritten pagination.
